title: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
